sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, hash_value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, hash_value) VALUES (1, 'Alice', farmFingerprint64('Alice'));
UPDATE test_table SET hash_value = farmFingerprint64(name) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, name, hash_value FROM test_table WHERE hash_value = farmFingerprint64('Alice');
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE hash_value = farmFingerprint64('Bob') AND id = 2;
